resposta:
solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def minEnd(self, n: int, x: int) -> int:
        res = 0
        for i in range(n - 1, -1, -1):
            res = (res | (x >> i)) << i
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses bitwise operations to construct the array. It starts from the most significant bit of x and iteratively constructs the array from right to left. The result is the minimum possible value of nums[n - 1].
